summary: Complete testing of Pass-e-port travel website. All backend APIs pass (15/15 tests). Frontend features working: color-coded maps, ocean labels visible, new Festivals page functional with map and list view, month filter working. Map projection changed to geoNaturalEarth1 shows full world without clipping.

issues: NORTH ATLANTIC label text partially overlaps North America continent (first 2 letters 'NO' covered). Still readable as 'RTH LANTIC'. Consider repositioning slightly right or changing to single-line 'NORTH ATLANTIC'.

passed_tests: Backend: /api/seasons returns 20+ countries with season data
Backend: /api/visa returns 20+ countries with visa requirements
Backend: /api/weather returns exactly 110 countries with weather types
Backend: /api/plugs returns exactly 109 countries with plug types
Backend: /api/festivals returns 57 festivals across 12 months
Backend: /api/festivals?month=1 filter works (January festivals)
Backend: /api/festivals?month=6 filter works (June festivals)
Backend: /api/forex/rates returns INR base with 10+ currencies
Backend: /api/apps returns 20+ app recommendations
Backend: /api/apps filter by country and category works
Backend: /api/countries and /api/country/USA work correctly
Frontend: Navigation menu shows all pages including Festivals
Frontend: Seasons map displays full world with geoNaturalEarth1 projection
Frontend: Visa map displays full world without clipping
Frontend: Weather map shows 110 countries color-coded
Frontend: Power Plugs map shows 109 countries with plug type colors
Frontend: NEW Festivals page loads with map and 57 festival cards
Frontend: Festivals month filter works (57 total → 5 for March)
Frontend: Ocean labels visible (NORTH PACIFIC, SOUTH PACIFIC, INDIAN OCEAN, WEST PACIFIC, SOUTH ATLANTIC, SOUTHERN OCEAN)
Frontend: Festival cards show name, country, location highlight, description
action_items: MINOR: Consider adjusting NORTH ATLANTIC label position to avoid overlap with North America continent
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing database data (110 weather, 109 plugs, 57 festivals)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working. Backend has 110 weather records, 109 plug records, 57 festival records. New Festivals page uses WorldMap with mode='festivals'. Ocean labels are positioned in SVG at fixed coordinates. FOREX API has fallback to sample data (MOCKED when API unavailable).
mocked_apis_note: FOREX rates at /api/forex/rates falls back to MOCKED sample data when live API unavailable. Real-time weather /api/weather/realtime falls back to database when OPENWEATHER_API_KEY not configured.
